description: Value for money, the nike Downshifter 3 leather running shoes is great for the weekly runner, keeping you comfortable on the run. Versatile and offering all-day comfort, these shoes double up as great every day casual wear.Upper Soft, breathable leather uppers combined with midfoot overlays for durability and structure Mesh tongue for breathability Lace-ups for snug Fit Cushioned collar and tongue for plush comfort Swoosh logo on the sides to create a style statement Midsole Full-length lightweight Phylon midsole with supportive shank for lightweight feel, added support and impact protection Heel encapsulated Air-Sole unit for comfort and responsive cushioning Outsole Durable, lightweight, and flexible rubber outsole with BRS 1000 in the heel for added durability and easy movement of foot Wash careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
